---
name: "Project Cleaner Daily Review"
description: "Use when running end-of-day report cleanup and progress summaries."
agent: "project-cleaner"
argument-hint: "What to review (for example: website repo today, logs folder, or draft notes)"
---
Run a daily project cleanup and reporting review.

## Tasks
1. Scan recent files for critical errors and warnings.
2. List outstanding action items from today.
3. Summarize progress against current technical goals.
4. Keep the output concise and professional for end-of-day records.

If writing drafts are included, hand off to **Author's Assistant** for progress/consistency checks.
If log triage is needed, hand off to **Debug Helper** for read-only diagnostics.
